Estrogen_plus_cases.description: Number of cases in the Estrogen+ group (used to compute p̂₁ = 751/8506 and the standard error of ln(RR))

Estrogen_plus_total.description: Total number of women in the Estrogen+ group (used to compute p̂₁ and the standard error of ln(RR))

Estrogen_minus_cases.description: Number of cases in the Estrogen- group (used to compute p̂₂ = 623/8102 and the standard error of ln(RR))

Estrogen_minus_total.description: Total number of women in the Estrogen- group (used to compute p̂₂ and the standard error of ln(RR))
